mapper.select: SELECT * FROM hapumdb_test.program ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hapumdb_test.program_subs (user_id, program_id, subs_on, is_app, part_count, relation, org_name, reason, opinion) VALUES (#{userId}, #{programId}, NOW(), 'N', #{partCount}, #{relation}, #{orgName},#{reason}, #{opinion})
mapper.select: SELECT ps.id AS program_sub_id, ps.program_id, ps.user_id, ps.is_app, u.id AS user_id, u.name, u.phone, u.email FROM hapumdb_test.program_subs ps JOIN hapumdb_test.user u ON ps.user_id = u.id WHERE ps.program_id = #{programId}

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.subject, p.start_date AS startDate, p.end_date AS endDate, p.location, p.target, p.capacity, p.expense, p.thumbnail_src AS thumbnailSrc, p.create_on AS createOn, p.update_on AS updateOn, ps.id AS subsId, ps.subs_on AS subsOn, ps.is_app AS isApp FROM hapumdb_test.program p INNER JOIN hapumdb_test.program_subs ps ON p.id = ps.program_id WHERE ps.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE hapumdb_test.program SET open_status=#{code} where id=#{programId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hapumdb_test.program_add (name, content, thumbnail_src ) VALUES (#{name}, #{content}, #{thumbnailSrc})
mapper.select: select * from hapumdb_test.program where add_id =#{id} order by open_status desc, start_date
SELECT * FROM hapumdb_test.program WHERE start_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
SELECT * FROM hapumdb_test.program WHERE start_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} ORDER BY start_date
mapper.update: UPDATE hapumdb_test.program SET add_id = #{addId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, subject = #{subject}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, location = #{location}, target = #{target}, capacity = #{capacity}, expense = #{expense}, thumbnail_src = #{thumbnailSrc}, update_on = NOW(), need_org_name = #{needOrgName}, need_part_count = #{needPartCount}, need_relation = #{needRelation} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE hapumdb_test.program_add SET name = #{name}, content = #{content}, thumbnail_src = #{thumbnailSrc}, open_status = #{openStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE hapumdb_test.program SET is_popup=#{code} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE hapumdb_test.program SET is_image_Slide=#{code} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ps.id AS subs_id, COALESCE(ps.user_id, '-') AS user_id, COALESCE(u.name, '-') AS user_name, ps.program_id, ps.subs_on, ps.is_app, COALESCE(ps.part_count, '-') AS part_count, COALESCE(ps.relation, '-') AS relation, COALESCE(ps.org_name, '-') AS org_name, COALESCE(ps.reason, '-') AS reason, COALESCE(ps.opinion, '-') AS opinion, p.title, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.location, p.target FROM hapumdb_test.program_subs ps JOIN hapumdb_test.program p ON ps.program_id = p.id JOIN hapumdb_test.user u ON ps.user_id = u.id WHERE p.start_date > NOW() ORDER BY p.start_date ASC, ps.subs_on ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hapumdb_test.program_subs (user_id, program_id, subs_on, is_app, part_count, relation, org_name, reason, opinion) VALUES (#{userId}, #{programId}, NOW(), 'N', #{partCount}, #{relation}, #{orgName},#{reason}, #{opinion})

INSERT INTO hapumdb_test.program_subs_no_join ( program_id, subs_on, is_app, part_count, relation, org_name, reason, opinion, name, baptism_name, phone, parish ) VALUES ( #{programId}, NOW(), 'N', #{partCount}, #{relation}, #{orgName}, #{reason}, #{opinion}, #{name}, #{baptismName}, #{phone}, #{parish} );
mapper.select: SELECT psnj.id AS subs_id, '-' AS user_id, -- no_join 테이블에는 user_id 없음 psnj.program_id, psnj.subs_on, psnj.is_app, COALESCE(psnj.part_count, '-') AS part_count, COALESCE(psnj.relation, '-') AS relation, COALESCE(psnj.org_name, '-') AS org_name, COALESCE(psnj.reason, '-') AS reason, COALESCE(psnj.opinion, '-') AS opinion, COALESCE(psnj.name, '-') AS user_name, COALESCE(psnj.phone, '-') AS phone, COALESCE(psnj.baptism_name, '-') AS baptism_name, COALESCE(psnj.parish, '-') AS parish, COALESCE(psnj.phone, '-') AS phone, p.title, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.location, p.target FROM hapumdb_test.program_subs_no_join psnj JOIN hapumdb_test.program p ON psnj.program_id = p.id WHERE p.start_date > NOW() ORDER BY p.start_date ASC, psnj.subs_on ASC
